LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BART JOHNSON'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 18, 2012. OPPOSITION IS DUE ON 4/5/12; REPLY IS DUE ON 4/12/12. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOURIAN, MOHAMMED

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT BART JOHNSON'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION AND OVERRULED AS TO THE THIRD, FOURTH, FIFTH AND SIXTH CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED LEAVE TO AMEND THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION, IF HE CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO PLEAD HOW HE WOULD HAVE ACTED DIFFERENTLY IF THE NOTICES HAD NOT BEEN CONCEALED FROM HIM. THE THIRD, FOURTH, FIFTH AND SIXTH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE ADEQUATELY PLED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BART JOHNSON'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the first and second cause of action and overruled as to the third, fourth, fifth and sixth causes of action. Plaintiff is granted leave to amend the first and second causes of action, if he can do so in good faith, to plead how he would have acted differently if the notices had not been concealed from him. The third, fourth, fifth and sixth causes of action are adequately pled. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2012 Continued To Jun-01-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2012 Continued To Apr-18-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Bradley A. Russi, Esq., Deputy City Attorney , Tel. 554.3964, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Seth I. Rosenberg, Esq., of Minami Tamaki LLP, Tel. 788.9000, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BART JOHNSON'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to April 18, 2012. Opposition is due on 4/5/12; reply is due on 4/12/12. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
